name: Robby Mook, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Last day to be a founding donor:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Last day to become a Women for Hillary founding donor. | _You're receiving this because you're a member of Team Hillary -- thank you for your support!_

Friend --

Did you see Hillary's email this morning? Tonight is the deadline to become a founding donor to help launch Women for Hillary -- **[chip in right now so we can add your name.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjMzOTc2MjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwMDE3OTU3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

If we engage as many women as possible in this campaign, we're going to win this election. Please chip in today to help us launch this important program:

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/women-for-hillary-founding-donor/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjMzOTc2MjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwMDE3OTU3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks

Robby

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Hillary Clinton
Subject: I take this personally:

Friend --

We're launching Women for Hillary very soon, but the deadline to add your name as a founding donor is midnight tonight.

****[I hope you’ll contribute $1 or more right now so we can include you!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjMzOTc2MjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwMDE3OTU3S0&mt=2&rj=NjQwMDE3OTU3S0&rt=0)** **

I have to admit, I take it a little personally when Republicans go after women's rights, and women's health especially. Their extreme views are out-of-touch and out-of-date. We need to make sure not one of them becomes president. The way we do that is by engaging as many women in this campaign as possible.

**No matter your gender,****chip in $1 or more**** ****or more before midnight to become a founding donor of Women for Hillary:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/women-for-hillary-founding-donor/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjMzOTc2MjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwMDE3OTU3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Hillary

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjMzOTc2MjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwMDE3OTU3S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjMzOTc2MjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwMDE3OTU3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMzOTc2MjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwMDE3OTU3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMzOTc2MjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwMDE3OTU3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMzOTc2MjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwMDE3OTU3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjMzOTc2MjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwMDE3OTU3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMzOTc2MjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwMDE3OTU3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: a quick email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend --Just wanted to shoot you a quick email before our August deadline hits in just three hours. We only need 144 more grassroots donations to hit our goal. We need to show just how many people are standing with us as we fight to take back the Senate.

Please, give a gift to this link: **[http://action.vanhollen.org/august](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f0a/70cdc2ba/47a1c813/395b2fc/620448547/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em8312015_nd2&amount=5.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+give+Itrsquoll+only+take+a&utm_campaign=em8312015_ld2&source=em8312015_1hd")**

The pundits and media across the country are watching our race, so it's crucial we don't miss this goal.

Thanks for everything,

Chris

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f0a/70cdc2ba/47a1c813/395b2f7/620448547/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em8312015_nd2&source=em8312015_nd2") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Team Walker
subject: On Day One
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Walker Inc
body:
| [](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM0MDE4MzkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMDc1MDM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Peter, As a leader in the grassroots movement I wanted to share with you an ad our campaign just released. After you watch this ad, if you agree we need a president who will take big, bold action, then my hope is you will make a generous contribution to our campaign. [](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM0MDE4MzkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMDc1MDM2S0&mt=1&rt=0) America needs a president ready to lead on Day One. We need a leader who is tested and has shown they can fight and win for the American people. As Governor of Wisconsin I said we would stand by our conservative principles and fix what the previous liberal administration had broken. And we did just that: balanced the budget, reduced the unemployment rate from 8.1% to 4.6%, and cut taxes for all hard working taxpayers. If that sounds like the kind of leadership you want in our next president please contribute to our campaign today. Thank you, Scott Walker [Watch Now](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM0MDE4MzkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMDc1MDM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM0MDE4MzkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMDc1MDM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM0MDE4MzkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMDc1MDM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Paid for by Scott Walker Inc.
[www.ScottWalker.com](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM0MDE4MzkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMDc1MDM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Contributions or gifts to Scott Walker Inc. are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. We believe that email is a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters, but you can click [here](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=23401839&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMDc1MDM2S0&mt=1&rt=0) if you would like to unsubscribe from these messages
For more ways to get involved follow us on [Facebook](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM0MDE4MzkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMDc1MDM2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjM0MDE4MzkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMDc1MDM2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM0MDE4MzkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQwMDc1MDM2S0&mt=1&rt=0).
Scott Walker Inc. P.O. Box 620590, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Let's chat
body:
Friend,

One of the cool things about running for President is that you get to do some pretty amazing things. I want to share one of those with you.

On September 8, I'd like to spend the day with you in New York. We'll get coffee in the afternoon, and then we'll head to the very first episode of one of America's best late night shows, and you'll get a VIP Ticket.

**[All you need to do is chip in $3 or more right now, and you'll automatically be entered to win this all-expense paid trip to NYC.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/eptljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcrbbbr_dmdccsjg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Friend, this is going to be a day you don't forget. This is going to be one of those days you tell your grandchildren about.

[**So what do you have to lose? We'll fly you to New York City and everything is on us, including your flight and hotel. All you have to do is enter now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/izvkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrymmmh_dmdccsjg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**But time is running out, so you have to act now:[Jeb2016.com/Night-in-New-York-Sweepstakes/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/yclryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwskkkq_dmdccsjg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

See you in New York,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/dstkzrjwsmcfgbgtfrnksflbjjflwbzwkrdrcwbtcccr_dmdccsjg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=3430&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://jeb2016.com/night-in-new-york-sweepstakes-rules/). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://jeb2016.com/night-in-new-york-sweepstakes/). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/night-in-new-york-sweepstakes-donate/). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/night-in-new-york-sweepstakes/). Void in Florida and where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Monday, August 24, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Saturday, September 5, 2015 at 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time on Saturday, September 5, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: one (1) round-trip coach class plane ticket in the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,000; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; one (1) ticket to attend the series premiere of The Late Show with Stephen Colbert with an approximate retail value of $0; dinner with National Finance Co-Chair Woody Johnson, with an approximate retail value of $250; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $1,475. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules](https://jeb2016.com/night-in-new-york-sweepstakes-rules/). The Sponsor is Jeb 2016, Inc. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: PHOTO: A proud day for me
clean_body: LindseyGraham.com Today was a big day for me. It's good to be home. Friend - I wanted to share a photo of a very proud moment for me. Earlier today I officially put my name on the ballot for president in my home state of South Carolina. This was a big day for me, and I was honored to have my family and friends by my side. It's good to be home. Thank you, as always, for your support. I hope I will see you soon on the campaign trail. Lindsey Donate >>> Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016 This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information click here.
